name: Change Tracking
summary: Conformance reference for observing state mutation as a normalized Change Record (path/op/old/new/source/timestamp). Defines the CustomChangeStrategy contract, a strategy registry with per-scope selection, and observable change events — so snapshot-diff, Proxy, signals, Immer-patch, JSON Patch, and CRDT strategies become configurable and interoperable in one app. Generalizes the validation change-detection concern.
